_comment: Tag taxonomy for rootdrifter.io. Primary tags define content pillars and are surfaced in navigation/filtering; secondary tags are meta (platform/difficulty/category) used for cross-cutting filtering. Slugs are kebab-case to match Ghost's tag slugs. Usage guidelines: see README.md 'Tag taxonomy'.

primary.name: CTF Writeup
primary.description: Capture The Flag writeups from TryHackMe and HackTheBox — methodology-led, evidence-backed.

primary.name: Pentest Methodology
primary.description: Penetration testing methodology and technique breakdowns — repeatable process over one-off tricks.

primary.name: OSINT & Recon
primary.description: OSINT and reconnaissance techniques and tooling — passive footprinting through active enumeration.

primary.name: Security Notes
primary.description: General security concepts, tools, and reference material kept for repeated use.

primary.name: Security+ (SY0-701)
primary.description: CompTIA Security+ SY0-701 study notes and exam prep, mapped to the five domains.

primary.name: Detection Engineering
primary.description: Blue-team detection content from the Wazuh SIEM home lab — hypotheses, rules, validation.

secondary.name: Tool Spotlight
secondary.description: A post focused on a single tool, in depth.
